ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json import nowUtc from modules::datetime::utils --- { dateTime: nowUtc(), httpStatus: 200, status: "SUCCESS", message: "Customer records retrieved successfully.", correlationId: correlationId, data: { customers: [ { customerAccountNumber: "10001", customerAccountName: "Acme Corporation", partyNumber: "30001", partyName: "Acme Corporation", customerClassCode: "COMMERCIAL", accountStatus: "ACTIVE", accountType: "ORGANIZATION", accountSiteNumber: "50001", siteUseCode: "BILL_TO", primaryContactName: "Jane Smith", emailAddress: "ops@acme.example", phoneNumber: "+1-206-555-0100", addressLine1: "100 Main Street", addressLine2: "Suite 400", city: "Seattle", stateOrProvince: "WA", postalCode: "98101", countryCode: "US", activeFlag: true, createdDate: "2026-03-12T18:25:43Z", lastUpdatedDate: "2026-03-15T09:42:10Z" } ], recordCount: 1 } } as Object {encoding: "UTF-8", mediaType: "application/json"}
